box_guarantees._source: https://pokemoncard.co.kr/card/180 Korean official product/card list + FullAhead Japanese secret-card supplement. Historical opening reports: https://pokecanews.com/archives/9096; carton expectation summary: https://pokecanews.com/archives/10352 (SR-or-higher 13/12 boxes, TR 13/12 boxes, RR 40/12 boxes). High-rarity category estimate uses the 4,500-box community aggregate at https://pokemon-infomation.com/pull-rates-pokemoncard-ss/ (SR 70%, HR 20%, UR 10%); Pokemon/Trainer SR split follows the SR card composition in this set. Korean official pull rates are unpublished.
box_guarantees._sample_size: Historical community opening reports; high-rarity aggregate 4,500 boxes (cross-set)
